title: Khy's Rotten Tools x Weapons Expanded
description: Cool mod? Cool resource pack? Why not both!
body:
**This pack needs [Weapons Expanded](https://modrinth.com/mod/weaponsexpanded) to function as intended.**\
_it is also intended to be used with [Khy's Rotten Tools](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/khys-tool-pack)_

  If you ever felt the compulsive need to make everything in your modpack feel like its integrated seamlessly like I do, then you might've been let down from Weapons Expanded (My personal favorite vanilla+ weapons mod) due to it looking out of place when put alongside a resource pack.

Fear not, because if you use the best tool resource pack a.k.a Khy's rotten tools (the one I use), I now have become your 15-year-old deleted user's r/AskReddit post with the solution to your problem; A brand-new compatibility pack that'll finally put both pieces of the puzzle together through sheer brute force and duct tape

_I PROMISE the gallery will be updated to include a better showcase of the textures, im just reaaally sleepy rn_
